text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There is no more doubt in Symboli Rudolf's eyes.
She sees her path clearly, and it leads her to a
storied race of great prestige.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The newly reborn Emperor is ready to compete in
the spring Tenno Sho, where she will surely set a
tempest whirling.
